ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How to build a Cypher query?'})-[r1:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'cypher'}),
    p2 = (u:User {display_name: 'StackOverflowBot'})-[r2:ASKED]->(q),
    p3 = (q)-[r3:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer {title: 'Correct Cypher syntax'})-[r4:PROVIDED]->(u)
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does StackOverflowBot’s accepted answer on the "How to build a Cypher query?" question reflect the most common syntax patterns used in the 'cypher' tag?

cypher:
MATCH (q:Question {title: "How to build a Cypher query?"})-[:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer)<-[:PROVIDED]-(u:User)
MATCH (q)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'cypher'})
WITH q, a, u, collect(DISTINCT node.body_markdown) AS answer_markdown
RETURN q.title AS question_title, a.title AS accepted_answer_title, u.display_name AS user_display_name, answer_markdown
